mapper.select: select u.name from unit u where u.id = #{unitID}
select t.name from department t where t.id = #{depID}
select t.cname as name from role t where t.id = #{roleID}

select eo.grade as gid, eo.specialtyid as spid, g.name as gname, s.name as sname from examobject eo left join grade g on eo.grade = g.id left join specialty s on eo.specialtyid = s.id where eo.eid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select count(e.id) as num from examinfo e left join teacher t on t.id = e.teacherid where e.state = #{state} and e.aorb = 0
and (exists( select * from (select tp.eid from teacher_paper tp where tp.pid in(n'31',n'30',n'33',n'35',n'37',n'36',n'38',n'39') and tp.tid= #{tid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} union select ei.id as eid from examinfo ei,teacher tea where ei.state=#{state} and ei.unitid=tea.unitid and tea.id=#{tid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}) temp where e.id=temp.eid) or e.teacherid=#{tid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})
and (exists( select 1 from teacher_paper tp where e.id = tp.eid and tp.pid in(n'31',n'30',n'33',n'35',n'37',n'36',n'38',n'39') and tp.tid =#{tid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}) or e.teacherid=#{tid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})
and e.id in (select eo.eid from examobject eo where 1 = 1
and eo.grade in #{gid}
and eo.specialtyid in #{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
)
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid in ( select c.id from course c where c.unitid in #{unid}))
and (e.id like '%'||#{num}||'%' or e.ename like '%'||#{num}||'%')
and (t.name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%' or t.real_name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%')
and e.mobile in(#{mobile},2)
and to_date(#{beginDate},'yyyy-MM-dd') <= trunc(e.enddate) and to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-MM-dd') >= trunc(e.enddate)

select count(e.id) as num from examinfo e left join teacher t on t.id = e.teacherid
where e.state = 3 and e.enddate>=sysdate
where (exists( select 1 from teacher_paper tp where e.id = tp.eid and tp.pid in(n'31',n'30',n'33',n'35',n'37',n'36',n'38',n'39') and tp.tid =#{tid}) or e.teacherid=#{tid}) and e.state = 3 and e.enddate>=sysdate
and e.testtimeset=2
and e.testtimeset!=2
and e.id in (select eo.eid from examobject eo where 1 = 1
and eo.grade in #{gid}
and eo.specialtyid in #{sid}
)
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and e.cid in (select c.id from course c where c.unitid in #{unid})
and e.begindate >= trunc(sysdate - #{limitDay})
and (e.id like '%'||#{num}||'%' or e.ename like '%'||#{num}||'%')
and (t.name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%' or t.real_name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%')
and e.mobile in(#{mobile},2)
and to_date(#{beginDate},'yyyy-MM-dd') <= trunc(e.enddate) and to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-MM-dd') >= trunc(e.enddate)

select e.id as id, e.ename as ename, e.cid as cid, e.cname as cname, e.code as code, e.type as type, e.begindate as begindate, e.enddate as enddate, e.teacherid as teacherid, tm.name as testmode, t.real_name as teachername, t.name as username, e.firstverifyname as firstverifyname, e.unitid as unitid, e.depid as depid, e.bid as bid, e.cpid as cpid, e.state as state, e.autotest as autotest, nvl(e.subjectsum,0) as subjectsum, e.chosen as chosen, e.aorb as aorb, nvl(e.scount,0) as scount, nvl(be.scount,0) as bscount, nvl(be.subjectsum,0) as bsum, nvl(ce.scount,0) as cscount, nvl(ce.subjectsum,0) as csum, be.isunion as isunion from examinfo e left join examinfo be on be.id=e.bid left join examinfo ce on ce.id=e.cpid left join test_mode tm on tm.id = e.testtimeset left join teacher t on t.id = e.teacherid where e.state = #{state} and e.aorb = 0
and (exists( select * from (select tp.eid from teacher_paper tp where tp.pid in(n'31',n'30',n'33',n'35',n'37',n'36',n'38',n'39') and tp.tid= #{tid} union select ei.id as eid from examinfo ei,teacher tea where ei.state=#{state} and ei.unitid=tea.unitid and tea.id=#{tid}) temp where e.id=temp.eid) or e.teacherid=#{tid})
and (exists( select 1 from teacher_paper tp where e.id = tp.eid and tp.pid in(n'31',n'30',n'33',n'35',n'37',n'36',n'38',n'39') and tp.tid =#{tid}) or e.teacherid=#{tid})
and e.id in (select eo.eid from examobject eo where 1 = 1
and eo.grade in #{gid}
and eo.specialtyid in #{sid}
)
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid=#{cid})
and e.mobile in(#{mobile},2)
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid in ( select c.id from course c where c.unitid in #{unid}))
and (e.id like '%'||#{num}||'%' or e.ename like '%'||#{num}||'%')
and (t.name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%' or t.real_name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%')
and to_date(#{beginDate},'yyyy-MM-dd') <= trunc(e.enddate) and to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-MM-dd') >= trunc(e.enddate)
order by t.real_name
order by e.id
order by e.ename
order by e.cname
order by e.begindate
order by e.enddate
order by e.unitid
order by e.begindate
desc
asc
order by begindate desc

select e.id, e.ename, e.cid, e.cname, e.code, e.type, e.begindate, e.enddate, e.teacherid, t.real_name as teachername, t.name as username, e.unitid, e.depid, e.bid, e.state, e.autotest, e.subjectsum, e.chosen, e.aorb, e.restart, nvl(e.scount,0) as scount, e.isunion, tm.name as testmode, NVL(cnt.stuPaperCount, 0) AS stuPaperCount
,nvl(be.scount,0) as bscount, nvl(be.subjectsum,0) as bsum
from examinfo e left join test_mode tm on tm.id = e.testtimeset left join teacher t on t.id = e.teacherid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT see.eid, COUNT(*) AS stuPaperCount FROM student_exam_exam see JOIN student s ON see.sid = s.id AND (s.specialtyid != '0' OR s.specialtyid IS NULL) WHERE see.r_state = 0 GROUP BY see.eid ) cnt ON e.id = cnt.eid
left join examinfo be on be.id=e.bid
where e.state = 3 and e.enddate>=sysdate
where (exists( select 1 from teacher_paper tp where e.id = tp.eid and tp.pid in(n'31',n'30',n'33',n'35',n'37',n'36',n'38',n'39') and tp.tid =#{tid}) or e.teacherid=#{tid}) and e.state = 3 and e.enddate>=sysdate
and e.testtimeset=2
and e.testtimeset!=2
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid=#{cid})
and e.cid in (select c.id from course c where c.unitid in #{unid})
and e.begindate >= trunc(sysdate - #{limitDay})
and ( e.id like '%'||#{num}||'%' or e.ename like '%'||#{num}||'%' )
and ( t.name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%' or t.real_name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%' )
and e.mobile in(#{mobile},2)
and to_date(#{beginDate},'yyyy-MM-dd') <= trunc(e.enddate) and to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-MM-dd') >= trunc(e.enddate)
order by e.begindate desc

select t.id,t.name as uname, t.real_name as name, t.unitid, t.depid, t.roleid from teacher t where t.roleid!='1' and state=1 and t.id in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select distinct tp.tid,tp.pid,t.roleid as rid from teacher_permission tp,teacher t where t.roleid!='1' and t.id=tp.tid and tp.pid in(n'11',n'35',n'36') and tp.cid in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select * from teacher_paper tp where tp.pid=n'35' and tp.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select * from teacher_paper tp where tp.pid=n'36' and tp.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.state as state from EXAMTYPE t where t.id = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from teacher_paper t where t.tid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from teacher_paper t where t.tid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.pid in (n'31',n'32',n'33',n'34',n'37',n'39')
mapper.insert:
insert into teacher_paper(tid, eid, pid)
select #{uid}, #{eid}, #{item} from dual
mapper.select: select t.tid, t.pid from teacher_paper t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.subjectsum as num from examinfo t where t.id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.bid from examinfo t where t.id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.cpid from examinfo t where t.id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select t.qid as qid, qt.qtid as qtid, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.atid as atid, t.content as content, t.th as th from exampaper_question_db t left join exampaper_questiontype qt on t.qtid = qt.qtid and qt.eid=#{eid} where t.ismain = 0 and t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and qt.atid in ('5','6','7','12','13') order by qt.qtorder, t.th
mapper.insert:
insert into teacher_question(tid, qid, eid)
select #{item.tid}, #{item.qid}, #{eid} from dual
mapper.delete: delete from teacher_question t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into teacher_scorereview(tid, eid)
select #{item}, #{eid} from dual
mapper.delete: delete from teacher_scorereview t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select t.qid||','||t.tid as res from teacher_question t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.tid from teacher_scorereview t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select count(t.eid) as num from student_exam t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update examinfo ei set ei.bid ='' where ei.id = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and ei.bid = #{bid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
update examinfo ei set ei.cpid ='' where ei.id = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and ei.cpid = #{cpid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
mapper.select: select distinct s.class as cla from student_exam se inner join student s on s.specialtyid is not null and s.specialtyid!='0' and s.id=se.sid where se.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into teacher_class(tid, class, eid)
select #{item.tid}, #{item.cla}, #{eid} from dual
mapper.delete: delete from teacher_class t where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select t.tid,t.class from teacher_class t where t.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select e.id as id, e.ename as ename, e.cid as cid, e.cname as cname, e.begindate as begindate, e.enddate as enddate, e.teacherid as teacherid, tm.name as testmode, t.real_name as teachername, t.name as username, e.unitid as unitid, e.depid as depid, e.bid as bid, e.state as state, e.autotest as autotest, nvl(e.subjectsum,0) as subjectsum, e.chosen as chosen, e.aorb as aorb, nvl(e.scount,0) as scount, nvl(be.scount,0) as bscount, nvl(be.subjectsum,0) as bsum, e.type as type from examinfo e left join examinfo be on be.id=e.bid left join test_mode tm on tm.id = e.testtimeset left join teacher t on t.id = e.teacherid where (e.mobile = 1 or e.mobile = 3)
and e.state = #{state} and e.aorb = 0
and ((exists( select 1 from teacher_paper tp where e.id = tp.eid and tp.pid in(n'31',n'30',n'33',n'35',n'37',n'36',n'38',n'39') and tp.tid =#{tid}) or e.teacherid=#{tid}) or e.cid=#{wj_cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) and e.state = #{state} and e.aorb = 0
and e.id in (select eo.eid from examobject eo where 1 = 1
and eo.grade in #{gid}
and eo.specialtyid in #{sid}
)
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid=#{cid})
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid in ( select c.id from course c where c.unitid in #{unid}))
and (e.id like '%'||#{num}||'%' or e.ename like '%'||#{num}||'%')
and (t.name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%' or t.real_name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%')
ORDER BY
NLSSORT(t.real_name, 'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') DESC
e.scount DESC e.id DESC e.ename DESC e.cname DESC e.begindate DESC e.enddate DESC e.unitid DESC e.id DESC
ORDER BY e.id DESC

select count(e.id) as num from examinfo e left join teacher t on t.id = e.teacherid where e.mobile = 1
and e.state = #{state} and e.aorb = 0
and ((exists( select 1 from teacher_paper tp where e.id = tp.eid and tp.pid in(n'31',n'30',n'33',n'35',n'37',n'36',n'38',n'39') and tp.tid =#{tid}) or e.teacherid=#{tid}) or e.cid=#{wj_cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) and e.state = #{state} and e.aorb = 0
and e.id in (select eo.eid from examobject eo where 1 = 1
and eo.grade in #{gid}
and eo.specialtyid in #{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
)
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and e.id in(select distinct(ec.eid) from exampaper_course ec where ec.cid in ( select c.id from course c where c.unitid in #{unid}))
and (e.id like '%'||#{num}||'%' or e.ename like '%'||#{num}||'%')
and (t.name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%' or t.real_name like '%'||#{teacher}||'%')
select t.unitid as unitid from examinfo t where t.id = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
